module.name: client
module.purpose: Client-facing source split into an interactive streaming CLI, a remoc-backed core client session/task endpoint, executor dispatch returning ToolRuntime status streams, and a unified tool layer where ToolRegistry is constructed from Config, stores the current Platform, filters unsupported tools, publishes previews from registered tools only, and native helpers normalize complete-or-cancelled results through ToolExecutionResult, with the tool layer sourcing its shared ToolSchema and ToolParameter types from common::protocol.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Interactive CLI binary entry and public interface for connecting to the core client endpoint, sending each typed prompt as a chat request, streaming response segments to stdout, and reporting how many segments were printed, with mod.rs limited to module wiring.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core client session endpoint backed by remoc/TCP with task creation, initial request submission, and streamed response segment receives.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Client-side executor dispatch API that accepts ToolInvocation and returns ToolRuntime for status streaming plus cancellation shape, with behavior left as a draft stub.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Client-side unified tool layer with common-config Platform support markers, ToolRuntime status/cancel contracts, platform-filtering ToolRegistry behavior, category metadata, typed errors, a Tool trait returning the shared common::protocol ToolSchema, ToolInvocation carrying a common::protocol ToolParameter, and folder-organized native Tool implementations that expose NAME/DESCRIPTION/SCHEMA consts and are published through native tool list functions.
